data.title: Euclid Power raises $20M Series A led by Venrock to boost renewable energy projects with AI platform.
data.description: In New York, Euclid Power, a company specializing in renewable energy project development, financing, and operations, has revealed a successful $20 million Series A funding round. The investment was spearheaded by Venrock and saw contributions from HSBC Asset Management, as well as previous backers such as Spero Ventures, Toba Capital, Designer Fund, and Commonweal Ventures. This development comes in response to escalating energy needs driven by artificial intelligence, putting pressure on the grid. Additionally, the renewable sector faces challenges due to impending federal compliance regulations that could impede its growth.
Trump addresses tech leaders at dinner

data.title: Broadcom exceeded analyst estimates in Q3, sales outlook strong. Stock fluctuated. #AI #InvestorsBusinessDaily
data.description: Broadcom exceeded analyst expectations in its fiscal third quarter and provided a sales forecast above estimates for the current period. Despite the positive results, Broadcom's stock showed volatility. The company's report highlighted its strength in artificial intelligence technology.

data.title: Stock market rallies, Dow Jones Futures rise with Amazon, Netflix signaling buys, Shopify, and Broadcom.
data.description: Before the release of the jobs report, the stock market saw a rally, boosted by buy signals from Amazon, Netflix, and Shopify. Broadcom also experienced late gains. Dow Jones Futures surged amid this positive momentum. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Myriad Genetics' Precise MRD data on ccRCC patients published in The Lancet Oncology, Sept. 04, 2025. #PrecisionMedicine
data.description: On September 4, 2025, a top molecular diagnostic testing company, Myriad Genetics, Inc. (NASDAQ: MYGN), revealed that The Lancet Oncology featured a study showcasing the effectiveness of Myriad’s Precise® MRD test in individuals with oligometastatic clear-cell renal cell carcinoma (ccRCC). The study’s findings provide crucial insights into the performance of the MRD test in this specific patient population.

data.title: PBS plans to reduce staff by 15% after Congress slashes $500M in annual funding for public broadcasters.
data.description: This year, Congress decided to remove $500 million in yearly funding from public broadcasters, which includes PBS stations.

data.title: Trump's attempt to fire Federal Reserve Gov. Lisa Cook hasn't hurt S&P 500 yet. Impact minimal on Tuesday.
data.description: The recent decision by President Trump to dismiss Federal Reserve Governor Lisa Cook did not significantly affect the financial markets on Tuesday. However, concerns are rising about potential repercussions if the President's efforts to exert more control over the Federal Reserve come to fruition. Despite the uncertainty surrounding this move, the S&P 500 did not show any negative impacts as of now.

data.title: SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. acquires Class A self-storage facility in Rahway, NJ with 53,450 sq ft and 550 units.
data.description: Located in Rahway, New Jersey, SmartStop Self Storage REIT, Inc. recently acquired a top-tier self-storage facility at 2255 Elizabeth Avenue. This Class A property boasts over 53,450 net rentable square feet across four modern stories. Featuring around 550 climate-controlled units, this investment enhances SmartStop's portfolio as a leading owner and operator of self-storage facilities in the U.S. and Canada.

data.title: Bitcoin's Fate Above $120K Now Hinges On Fed Rate Cuts, Not Cypherpunk Ideals
data.description: Bitcoin's pricing in the traditional market is becoming more influential, with investors awaiting U.S. interest rate decisions before making decisions. Joel Valenzuela from Dash DAO reflects on the irony of Bitcoin's fate being intertwined with central banks it sought to circumvent. Bitcoin's peak price was $124,457 on August 13, later stabilizing near $113,000. New investors at the peak are now facing losses, with warnings of potential heavy selling pressures at $120,000. Analyst Gautam Chhugani predicts support at $110,000, with a possible rally to $200,000 dependent on U.S. interest rate shifts. The Federal Reserve meeting in September will be crucial in determining Bitcoin's future trajectory. Traders are expecting a 25-basis-point rate cut. The full article is available on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Viking partners with Focus Features for "Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale," to release on September 12 in the U.S. and U.K. #VIK
data.description: In Los Angeles, Viking® (www.viking.com) (NYSE: VIK) disclosed a partnership with Focus Features, Universal Pictures, and Carnival Films to commemorate the upcoming release of the worldwide hit, Downton Abbey: The Grand Finale, scheduled for September 12 in the U.S. and U.K. Viking's corporate backing of the esteemed series MASTERPIECE, which commenced in 2011 during the PBS broadcast of Downton Abbey, has significantly contributed to Viking's widespread recognition, solidifying its position as a prominent brand.

data.title: Zepp Health acquires core assets of Wild.AI to support female athletes, expanding wellness platform. (Characters: 89)
data.description: In Milpitas, California, Zepp Health (NYSE: ZEPP) has recently acquired the primary assets and intellectual property of Wild.AI, a leading women's wellness platform.

data.title: Samsara exceeds Q2 earnings, revenue expectations with stock rising; October sales guidance slightly above views.
data.description: Samsara's stock saw a surge following the release of their Q2 earnings report, surpassing Wall Street's expectations in both earnings and revenue despite low initial forecasts. The company also provided October-quarter sales guidance that slightly exceeded projections. The strong performance was highlighted in a post titled "Samsara Earnings Top Wall Street Targets. Sales Guidance Above Views" on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Jeff Noblin appointed Senior VP of South Central Region at ExchangeRight to deepen relationships and provide access to Essential Income REIT & 1031 DST portfolios.
data.description: ExchangeRight has recently welcomed Jeff Noblin as the new senior vice president of the South Central region, covering Texas, Oklahoma, Louisiana, and Arkansas. In this position, Noblin will collaborate with financial advisors and representatives to enhance connections and offer access to ExchangeRight’s Essential Income REIT and 1031 DST portfolios. These portfolios aim to provide capital preservation, steady income, and tax-efficient options. Noblin's appointment signifies ExchangeRight's commitment to expanding its presence in the region.
